title: Safely finalize a tenant-scoped key rollout
prompt: Repair the online tenant-key migration in `src/TenantKeyRollout/TenantKeyMigration.cs`. Existing records are backfilled in bounded, restartable batches with a tenant-scoped key, and duplicate external keys must remain valid across different tenants while collisions inside one tenant are reported and block completion. Concurrent or partial updates must not corrupt progress. Legacy writers may continue inserting records without the new key during the rollout, so migration completion must close that write-path race before it decides the table is ready. The final required/unique constraint may be activated only after a safe readiness check, and an incomplete or conflicting rollout must fail without attempting constraint activation. Keep the public API and existing behavior intact, and do not modify the tests. Verification is offline and succeeds with `python3 -B tests/verify.py`.
